message:
chore(beads): Comprehensive audit of all major EPICs with test coverage

Performed deep review of 6 major EPICs to ensure optimal structure,
proper dependencies, and comprehensive test coverage with detailed
logging requirements.

## EPICs Audited

1. **Assignment Flow EPIC (bd-pjjk7)**
   - Verified dependency chain: bd-55pm, bd-92e1 → bd-k3zq → features
   - Linked 11 test tasks to EPIC (unit tests + E2E tests)
   - Linked file reservation tests to File Reservation EPIC (bd-dz3r)

2. **Fleet Management EPIC (bd-10ufs)**
   - Added missing dependency: bd-377a (review-queue) → bd-92e1
   - Linked send enhancements to bd-3kmf (batch send)
   - Preserved all orchestration features: scale, rebalance, review-queue

3. **Context Continuity EPIC (bd-khux0)**
   - Verified excellent dependency structure
   - Confirmed comprehensive test coverage in bd-18kw9

4. **Robot Mode EPIC (bd-2dovu)**
   - Linked E2E tests (bd-hs3a0, bd-1a6c4) to EPIC
   - Added E2E → unit test dependencies

5. **Flywheel Bridges EPIC (bd-26c53)**
   - Linked flywheel tests (bd-2unr, bd-38ik) to EPIC

6. **Dashboard/Cockpit EPIC (bd-22nh8)**
   - Verified 11-child structure including sub-EPICs
   - UI fixes (bd-36he) down to 3 open items

## New Beads Created

- bd-168bh: Unit Tests - Watch mode loop and exit conditions
- bd-258jg: Unit Tests - Assignment status filtering and summary stats
- bd-2ru33: Task - Standardize JSON output format across ntm assign commands
- bd-2wd98: Unit Tests - Retry failed assignments logic
- bd-7gyss: Task - Ensure common flags consistency across ntm assign

## Test Logging Standards Added

All test beads now include detailed logging requirements:
- Unit tests: [TEST-UNIT-*] format with test name, inputs, outputs
- E2E tests: [E2E-*] format with timestamps, steps, status, details

## Graph Health Verified

- Total beads: 1097 (287 open, 810 closed)
- No dependency cycles detected
- 133 actionable items ready for implementation
- Top blockers identified: bd-92e1 (8), ntm-dwuv (5), bd-3kmf (4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
